tags.name: Product
tags.description: Product catalog, variant management, pricing, and category operations

tags.name: Inventory Reservations
tags.description: Stock reservation lifecycle for order processing

tags.name: POS Sales
tags.description: Online POS sale recording and sale history queries

tags.name: Inventory Stock
tags.description: Stock level reads and warehouse adjustments

tags.name: Warehouse Admin
tags.description: Admin read-only view of fulfillment tasks

tags.name: Warehouse Fulfillments
tags.description: Fulfillment lifecycle management — picking, packing, shipping

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: JWT-based authentication, token refresh, and user management

tags.name: Product Images
tags.description: Upload, delete, and manage product images stored in MinIO

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Order creation, status management, and fulfilment

tags.name: POS Terminals
tags.description: POS terminal registration, deactivation, and queries

tags.name: POS Sync
tags.description: Offline sale submission and sync status queries

put.summary: Record picked quantity for a fulfillment line
put.description: Updates quantity_picked. Only valid while fulfillment is in PICKING status.

get.description: Returns full product details by product ID

put.description: Updates product details. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.
Updates (or creates) the price for a variant. Requires ADMIN role.
Sets the terminal status to INACTIVE. Writes audit_log before mutation.
Transitions a CONFIRMED order to FULFILLED. Warehouse staff or Admin only.

409.description: Order is not in CONFIRMED state

put.description: Cancels a PENDING order, releases inventory, and refunds (stub for MVP).

409.description: Order is not in a cancellable state

get.description: Returns the profile of a single user. Requires ADMIN role.

put.description: Updates a user's role and/or active status. Writes audit log before the update. Requires ADMIN role.

post.description: Finalises the shipment. Writes any WRITE_OFF adjustments for discrepant lines (audit log written before each adjustment). Marks order as FULFILLED. Publishes warehouse.fulfillment.shipped.

400.description: Invalid state or missing required fields

post.description: Only valid from PENDING or PICKING status. PACKED and SHIPPED are non-cancellable.
Valid targets: PICKING (from PENDING), PACKED (from PICKING). Use /ship for PACKED→SHIPPED.

400.description: Invalid transition or missing carrier info

post.description: Creates a new product. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.

get.description: Returns all variants for the given product

post.description: Creates a new variant with initial price. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.
Sets variant status to INACTIVE. Requires ADMIN role.

get.description: Returns all images for a product, ordered by display_order

post.description: Uploads an image to MinIO and associates it with a product or variant. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.

400.description: Invalid request or unsupported media type

post.description: Sets product status to INACTIVE. Requires ADMIN role.
Sets product status back to ACTIVE. Requires ADMIN role.
Promotes an image to primary for its product. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.

get.description: Returns the full active category hierarchy

post.description: Creates a new product category. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all registered terminals.

post.description: Creates a new terminal record in ACTIVE status at the given inventory location.

post.summary: Submit offline sale batch for sync
post.description: Processes a batch of offline sale payloads recorded while the terminal was disconnected. Each item is processed independently — a failure on one item does not roll back successfully processed items. Maximum batch size: 100 items.

400.description: Invalid request or batch exceeds 100 items

200.description: Batch processed (check result for per-item failures)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of sales for a terminal, ordered by sold_at DESC.

post.description: Validates variants, fetches prices, creates an Order module order, and persists the POS sale record. Supply X-Idempotency-Key header to safely retry without creating duplicate orders.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders placed by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new order, reserves inventory, and processes payment. Returns the new order ID on success.

409.description: Business rule violation (inactive variant, insufficient stock)

post.description: Atomic source decrement + destination increment. Warehouse/Admin only.
Positive delta = inflow; negative delta = outflow. Warehouse/Admin only.

get.description: Returns reservations optionally filtered by status. Admin/Warehouse roles only.

post.description: Reserves stock for all line items. Validates variants active. Returns 201 on success, 409 on insufficient stock.
Transitions PENDING → RELEASED. Returns stock to available pool.

404.description: No PENDING reservations for this order

post.description: Transitions PENDING → CONFIRMED. Stock permanently deducted.

404.description: No PENDING reservations for this order

post.description: Determines POS priority vs buffer stock vs BUFFER_EXHAUSTED. Called by POS module during online sync. Returns the resolution outcome.

get.description: Returns all inventory locations

post.description: Admin only

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users. Optionally filter by role and/or active status. Requires ADMIN role.

post.description: Creates a new user account with any role. Requires ADMIN role
Deactivates a user account. Requires ADMIN role. Writes audit log before update
Creates a new user account. Role defaults to CUSTOMER if not provided
Exchanges a valid opaque refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair (rolling refresh)
Revokes the current refresh token. Access token expires naturally within 15 minutes
Authenticates with username/password and returns a JWT access token and opaque refresh token

get.description: Returns the current lifecycle status of an order.

patch.description: Manually transitions an order to a new status. Valid: PENDING→CONFIRMED, PENDING→CANCELLED, CONFIRMED→FULFILLED.

get.summary: Get fulfillment task detail by fulfillment ID

get.description: Returns full fulfillment detail including all lines, shipment info, and current order status.
Returns variant summary by variantId. Used by the admin inventory list.
Full-text search across product name and brand (ILIKE for MVP)
Returns paginated products in the given category
Returns terminal details including current status and last seen timestamp.

get.summary: Get sync status for a terminal
get.description: Returns real-time counts of pending and failed sync queue entries for operator dashboard monitoring.
Returns paginated offline POS sales with non-N_A sync status (PENDING, SYNCED, CONFLICT_RESOLVED, FAILED). Filter by terminalId and/or status.
Returns full sale details including all line items.
Returns full order details including all line items.
Returns a paginated list of all orders across all users. Admin and Staff only.

get.summary: Admin: list all notifications (paginated, filterable by type and status)
Admin: get notification detail by ID
Count unread (sent) in-app notifications for a user

get.description: Returns all stock records with location. Admin/Warehouse roles only.

get.summary: Get stock level at a specific location
get.description: Returns available and reserved quantities. Results cached 30 s.

get.summary: Check if quantity is available for a variant
get.description: Returns true if total available >= requested quantity.

get.summary: Get aggregated availability across all locations
get.description: Returns total available + per-location breakdown. Cached 60 s.

get.summary: Get movement history for a variant
get.description: Returns paginated movement records for a specific product variant.

get.summary: Get movement history for a location
get.description: Returns paginated movement records for a specific inventory location.
Returns the authenticated user's profile

delete.description: Deletes an image from MinIO and the database. Requires ADMIN or STAFF role.
